\tzpentry{ID5735}{Split Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5735 introduces Split Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \begin{split} \mathcal{L}_{total} &= \frac{1}{2}\boldsymbol{\omega} \cdot (I \cdot \boldsymbol{\omega}) + \frac{1}{2}m_{total}\dot{\mathbf{r}}_{cm}^2 \\ &\quad + \frac{\epsilon_0}{2}\int_{\mathbb{R}^3} \left(\frac{\partial \mathbf{A}}{\partial t}\right)^2 d^3x \\ &\quad - \boldsymbol{\mu}_{eff} \cdot \mathbf{B}_{ext} + \mathcal{L}_{coupling} \end{split} \end{equation}
